- Simplify Babel config and stop using runtime, everything we depend on has been in browsers for 6+ years
- `Link` no longer supports `as` or `activePropName`, use the function child version for that
- All JSX components have moved under `found/jsx` to differentiate them and remove a bunch of TS hacks
- Removed a bunch of old support for React class component Proxy libraries","update to RTL

> This release includes some new APIs for those that want to use a custom React Context with our Hooks API, a small memory optimization, and has a fix for when the `store` changes on a `Provider` with incompatible `children`.
